{{CargoRelic
|name=Snail Bubble Tea
|class_id=21000
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Each cup of Snail Bubble Tea comes at the cost of many snail lives. The carefully processed snails are slow-brewed to perfection, revealing a distinct spiral pattern and a delightfully chewy texture. Paired with a premium high-mountain oolong base and rich fresh milk, it’s the signature favorite of the Bird.
|fame=55
|art=5
|fth=5
|civ=5
|tech=5
|ss1=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +10<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss2=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +15<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss3=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +20<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss4=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +20<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss7=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail HP +20<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365<br> (Awakened)
}}
